blocks.body: Present Perfect: przeczenia — haven't / hasn't + V3 dla czynności, które jeszcze się nie wydarzyły, i doświadczenia, którego nadal nie ma.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W przeczeniach Present Perfect używamy have not / has not + V3 albo krótkich form haven't / hasn't.","rules":[{"label":"haven't / hasn't + V3","color":"emerald","text":"Przeczenie budujemy przez have / has, a nie przez do / does.","example":"I haven't finished. / She hasn't called."},{"label":"Yet","color":"blue","text":"Yet często stoi na końcu zdania, gdy czynność nadal nie jest zakończona do teraz.","example":"We haven't eaten yet."},{"label":"Never","color":"amber","text":"Never pokazuje, że dane doświadczenie nie wydarzyło się do tego momentu.","example":"He has never seen snow."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele przeczenia","intro":"Zacznij od have / has, potem dodaj not i V3.","items":[{"label":"I / You / We / They","title":"haven't + V3","subtitle":"I haven't finished. / They haven't arrived."},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"hasn't + V3","subtitle":"She hasn't called. / It hasn't started."},{"label":"Yet","title":"... yet","subtitle":"We haven't done it yet. / He hasn't replied yet."},{"label":"Full forms","title":"have not / has not","subtitle":"Obie formy są poprawne, ale haven't / hasn't zwykle brzmią naturalniej w mowie."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy potrzebujemy przeczenia","sections":[{"label":"Rezultatu jeszcze nie ma","color":"emerald","description":"Czynność nadal nie dała rezultatu do chwili obecnej.","examples":[{"en":"I haven't found my keys yet.","ua":"Rezultatu nadal nie ma."},{"en":"She hasn't finished her report.","ua":"Zadanie wciąż nie jest ukończone."}]},{"label":"Brak doświadczenia","color":"blue","description":"Powiedz, że ktoś nigdy nie miał takiego doświadczenia.","examples":[{"en":"We have never tried this dish.","ua":"Brak doświadczenia do teraz."},{"en":"He has never flown alone.","ua":"To doświadczenie się nie wydarzyło."}]},{"label":"Niezakończony okres","color":"amber","description":"Stan albo czynność nie wydarzyły się w okresie, który trwa do teraz.","examples":[{"en":"I haven't seen her this week.","ua":"Ten tydzień jeszcze się nie skończył."},{"en":"They haven't lived here for long.","ua":"Okres do teraz nadal jest krótki."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie modele","intro":"Zobacz, jak działają przeczenia w Present Perfect.","rows":[{"en":"I haven't finished the task yet.","ua":"haven't + finished","note":"czynność nadal nie jest skończona"},{"en":"She hasn't called us today.","ua":"hasn't + called","note":"dzisiejszy dzień jeszcze trwa"},{"en":"We have never been to Berlin.","ua":"have never been","note":"doświadczenie do teraz"},{"en":"He hasn't found a job yet.","ua":"hasn't + found","note":"rezultatu nadal nie ma"}],"warning":"Nie mów I don't finished ani She hasn't went."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie do / does zamiast have / has.","wrong":"❌ I don't finished my work yet.","right":"✅ I haven't finished my work yet."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie złej formy V3.","wrong":"❌ She hasn't went home.","right":"✅ She hasn't gone home."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Stawianie yet w złym miejscu.","wrong":"❌ We haven't finished yet the task.","right":"✅ We haven't finished the task yet."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Przeczenie w Present Perfect = haven't / hasn't + V3.","Używaj haven't z I / you / we / they.","Używaj hasn't z he / she / it.","Yet często stoi na końcu zdania, a never pokazuje brak doświadczenia.","Po haven't / hasn't używaj V3."]}
